__comment: Exactly the entities whose spawn code calls PortalSpawnProcedure - i.e. the ones the mod
itself considers a Gate appearing in the world - minus portal_job_change, which is personal
to the player who used a Job Key and is nobody else's business.
portal_12 is NOT here on purpose: it is the 'Dungeon Exit Portal' that stands inside a Gate
dungeon. It never calls PortalSpawnProcedure. Including it announced a brand new Gate, with a
teleport button, every time anyone walked into a dungeon.
